languages.text: "Мы... мы много Призывов отсиживались в обороне, Ваша Светлость. Я не ставлю под сомнение ваше решение, но... однажды мы должны будем и контратаковать".
"We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."
languages.original_text: "Мы... мы много Призывов отсиживались в обороне, Ваша Светлость. Я не ставлю под сомнение ваше решение, но... однажды мы должны будем и контратаковать".

traits.locale_text: "We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."
"We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."
"We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."

languages.text: 「我々…我々は、多くのコールアップで守りに徹してきました、御{mf|御殿|御嬢様}。御決断に異議を唱えるものではありませんが…いつか反撃の時が来るでしょう」
languages.original_text: "We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."

traits.locale_text: 「我々…我々は、多くのコールアップで守りに徹してきました、御{mf|御殿|御嬢様}。御決断に異議を唱えるものではありませんが…いつか反撃の時が来るでしょう。」

languages.text: «Hemos... hemos luchado a la defensiva durante muchas generaciones, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No cuestiono su decisión, pero... un día tendremos que contraatacar».
languages.original_text: "We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."

traits.locale_text: «Hemos... hemos luchado a la defensiva durante muchas generaciones, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No cuestiono su decisión, pero... un día tendremos que contraatacar».

languages.text: “我们……我们已经固守了太多个征召周期了，大人。我并非质疑您的决定，只是……总有一天，我们必须做出反击。”
languages.original_text: "We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."

traits.locale_text: “我们……我们已经固守了太多个征召周期了，大人。我并非质疑您的决定，只是……总有一天，我们必须做出反击。”

languages.text: "Wir ... sind seit vielen Einberufungen in der Defensive, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich stelle Eure Entscheidung nicht infrage, aber ... eines Tages müssen wir zurückschlagen."
languages.original_text: "We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."

traits.locale_text: "Wir ... sind seit vielen Einberufungen in der Defensive, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Ich stelle Eure Entscheidung nicht infrage, aber ... eines Tages müssen wir zurückschlagen."

languages.text: "Biz... Biz birçok Sevk Grubu süresince savunmada kaldık {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Kararınızı sorgulamıyorum ama... Bir gün karşı saldırıya geçmemiz gerekecek."
languages.original_text: "We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."

traits.locale_text: "Biz... Biz birçok Sevk Grubu süresince savunmada kaldık {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Kararınızı sorgulamıyorum ama... Bir gün karşı saldırıya geçmemiz gerekecek."

languages.text: « Nous... nous sommes sur la défensive depuis de nombreuses Mobilisations, Votre Seigneurie. Je ne conteste pas votre décision, mais... un jour, nous devrons contre-attaquer. »
languages.original_text: "We... we've been on the defensive for many Call-Ups now, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I am not challenging your decision, but... one day we will have to counter-attack."

traits.locale_text: « Nous... nous sommes sur la défensive depuis de nombreuses Mobilisations, Votre Seigneurie. Je ne conteste pas votre décision, mais... un jour, nous devrons contre-attaquer. »
